Waits for and clicks continue_to_payment button in iframe with 60 second timeout. Waits for card_name_2co field to be attached with 3 second timeout. Checks if card_name_2co is visible and fills with 'John Doe' if present. Otherwise waits for first_name_2co, types 'John', presses Tab, waits for last_name_2co, types 'Doe'. Presses Tab, types credit card number into card_number_2co. Presses Tab, types expiration date as MM/YY format into exp_date_2co. Presses Tab, types CVV into cvv_2co. Waits for place_order_button to be visible with 60 second timeout and clicks it. Waits for update_shipping_billing_message to appear with 60 second timeout. Logs success. This handles the complete 2Checkout payment flow with keyboard navigation.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Playwright Page object

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of address in GlobalState.address_payload if it's a list. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: company_name
parameters.description: Optional company name to fill

functions.what_it_does: Fills shipping address form with address data from GlobalState with country-specific field handling. Creates ConfirmationPage instance. Gets address from GlobalState.address_payload at specified index or directly if not a list. Gets state name from address using fullState or fullState_{language_code}. If company_name provided, fills company_name_input. Fills street1_input and street2_input with address data. Checks if country is not in countries_without_city_mandate list (Hong Kong, Singapore) and fills city_input if required. Checks if country is not in countries_without_states_mandate list (Austria, Belgium, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Luxembourg, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Portugal, Puerto Rico, Singapore, Sweden, Switzerland) and calls select_state() if state is required. Checks if country is not in countries_without_zip_mandate list (Hong Kong) and fills zip_code_input if required. Fills phone_number_input. Clicks save_button. Tries to wait for suggested_address_modal with 60 second timeout. If modal appears and is enabled, clicks ship_to_address_button to accept suggested address. Catches exception if modal doesn't appear. This handles international address variations correctly.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Playwright Page object

parameters.name: state_name
parameters.description: Name of the state to select

parameters.name: avoid_state
parameters.description: If True, selects any state except state_name. Defaults to False.

functions.what_it_does: Selects a state from a dropdown, with option to avoid a specific state. Creates ConfirmationPage instance. Clicks state_dropdown to open it. Gets the dropdown element ID. Constructs selector for listbox options as '#{id}-listbox li'. If avoid_state is True, constructs selector to exclude state_name using ':not(:has-text())' and gets first matching option. Otherwise constructs selector to match state_name using ':has-text()'. Waits for the select_state element to be visible with 2 second timeout. Tries to get data-value attribute from the option element. Clicks the option to select it. Returns the data-value if found, otherwise returns state_name. This allows selecting states by name with fallback to avoiding specific states for negative testing.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Playwright Page object

parameters.name: plan_value
parameters.description: Expected plan value as string

functions.what_it_does: Verifies the plan value displayed on the plan details card matches the expected value. Calls get_plan_value_from_plan_details() to extract the plan value from the page. Asserts the extracted value equals the expected plan_value with descriptive error message showing both values if they don't match. This is a simple verification helper for plan value validation.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Playwright Page object

parameters.name: months
parameters.description: Number of months to pause (as string for dropdown value)

parameters.name: page_view
parameters.description: Which page the pause is initiated from. Options: 'Dashboard', 'Cancellation'. Defaults to 'Dashboard'.

functions.what_it_does: Pauses a subscription plan for a specified number of months from either Dashboard or Cancellation page. Creates OverviewPage and CancellationPage instances. If page_view is 'Dashboard', clicks overview_page.pause_plan_link. If page_view is 'Cancellation', clicks cancellation_page.pause_plan_link. Waits for pause_plan_modal to appear using .last locator. Clicks pause_plan_dropdown using .last locator to open it. Constructs selector for dropdown option with data-value matching months parameter. Clicks the months option. Clicks confirm_pause_plan button using .last locator. Waits for pause_plan_modal to be hidden. This completes the plan pause flow with month selection.

file_analyses.analysis_notes: This is the largest helper module in the codebase with 70 static methods covering comprehensive dashboard functionality. Key functional areas: (1) Dashboard access and navigation with authentication handling, (2) First-time user experience with modal dismissal logic, (3) Payment method management supporting multiple gateways (PGS with 3DS2, 2Checkout) and methods (credit cards, PayPal, direct debit, Google Pay, Apple Pay), (4) Address management with international variations handling countries without city/state/zip requirements, (5) Plan management including pause, resume, change, and cancellation, (6) Printer selection and management with multi-printer support, (7) Progress bar and usage verification for ink and paper plans, (8) Billing cycle and estimated charge validation with date tolerance, (9) Savings calculator verification, (10) Notification checking, (11) Footer link validation, (12) Session expiration handling, (13) Tour modal management, (14) FLIP conversion and paper enrollment flows. The add_pgs_billing method is particularly complex with 45 lines handling 3DS authentication including frame switching and challenge flow. The add_shipping method demonstrates sophisticated international address handling with country-specific field requirements. The module imports 27 different modules including 17 page objects, indicating it orchestrates complex multi-page workflows. The static method pattern with no instance state makes this highly reusable. No locators defined as it delegates to page objects. Heavy use of GlobalState for test data (address_payload, payment_method, country, language_code). The module serves as the central orchestrator for all dashboard-related test operations.

file_analyses.analysis_notes: This entry is a duplicate of the previous dashboard_helper.py analysis. The file was included twice in the batch. All analysis details are identical to the previous entry. The module contains 70 static methods covering dashboard access, payment processing, address management, plan operations, and various dashboard feature testing. Key methods include access(), first_access(), add_billing() with routing to multiple payment gateways, add_pgs_billing() with 3DS2 support, add_2co_billing(), add_shipping() with international address handling, select_state(), verify_plan_value(), and pause_plan(). The module serves as the central orchestrator for dashboard test operations with no locators defined as it delegates to page objects.

key_reusable_methods: run_flow — Core flow execution orchestrator with dynamic module loading
validate_context — Comprehensive validation engine with image comparison and animation support
compare_images_detect_then_filter — Pixel-level image comparison with exclusion regions
extract_animated_svgs — Advanced SVG animation detection and GIF conversion
extract_animated_visuals — Multi-format animation extraction (SVG, Canvas, Lottie)
compare_svg_xml — Robust semantic SVG comparison with normalization
DashboardHelper.access — Navigate to dashboard with authentication
DashboardHelper.first_access — Handle first-time user experience with modal dismissal
DashboardHelper.add_billing — Route to appropriate payment method handler
DashboardHelper.pause_plan — Pause subscription with month selection
